title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on a clear day】

whistle, scat & humming

梅雨入りを前に、春らしい爽やかさと暖かみを感じる選曲でお届け。
頬を撫でる春風のような口笛の音色が心地よく響くDJセットをお楽しみください。

Before the rainy season begins, this set brings you a selection filled with springlike freshness and warmth.
Enjoy a DJ set where whistling tones echo pleasantly, like a spring breeze gently brushing your cheek.

Listen To MyTube!
